name: Verify footer About Us section contains descriptive text about Sauce Demo

steps.name: Given  I am on the Sauce Demo homepage
Then  the footer "About Us" section should contain the text "This is a demo site created for"
And  the footer "About Us" section should contain the text "an awesome new way to make your Shopify site social"

labels.name: story
labels.value: Verify footer About Us section contains descriptive text about Sauce Demo

labels.name: testClass
labels.value: Verify footer About Us section contains descriptive text about Sauce Demo
